nl_query: Count blocked scripts per block reason category.
failed_sql:
SELECT sh.block_reason, COUNT(*) AS script_count
FROM script_hold sh
JOIN answer_script a ON sh.script_id = a.id
WHERE sh.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY sh.block_reason
ORDER BY script_count DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_hold.block_status, script_hold.block_status. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
